code:
import io
import string
import list

fn to_int(_ s: String) -> Int
  match string.parse_int(s)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn is_ws_byte(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut uniq: List<Int> = []
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  mut flush = false
  mut append = false
  mut cur_byte = 0
  if i == n
    flush = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws_byte(b)
        flush = true
      else
        append = true
        cur_byte = b
      end
    when None
      flush = true
    end
  end
  if append
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(cur_byte)}"
  end
  if flush
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      let v = to_int(token)
      if not list.contains(uniq, v)
        uniq = list.push(uniq, v)
      end
      token = ""
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut output = ""
mut first = true
while list.len(uniq) > 0
  match list.min(uniq)
  when Some(m)
    if first
      output = "#{m}"
      first = false
    else
      output = "#{output} #{m}"
    end
    mut next_list: List<Int> = []
    for x in uniq
      if x != m
        next_list = list.push(next_list, x)
      end
    end
    uniq = next_list
  when None
    uniq = []
  end
end
println(output)
